title: ggen-dspy concrete Evaluator
changes: Added ExactMatchEvaluator: returns 1.0 if prediction equals ground_truth (case-insensitive trim), else 0.0
Added ContainsEvaluator: returns 1.0 if ground_truth is substring of prediction (lowercased), else 0.0
Both implement Evaluator trait with async evaluate() and name()
Exported ExactMatchEvaluator and ContainsEvaluator from lib.rs
Added 6 unit tests (exact match/no-match/name, contains/no-match/name) using #[tokio::test]
Added evaluator: Box<dyn Evaluator> field to MiproOptimizer (defaults to ContainsEvaluator)
Added with_evaluator() builder method on MiproOptimizer
Rewrote score_instruction to accept &dyn Evaluator and call evaluator.evaluate() instead of inline heuristic
